title: Exterior Lighting / DRL / Adaptive LED Module Coding
description: After headlight assembly replacement on vehicles with adaptive, matrix, or LED lighting systems, the lighting module requires coding to match the new component. Simpler OEMs are plug-and-play; German OEMs require ISTA/ODIS.
common_symptoms: adaptive headlight fault after assembly replacement
DRL stays on or stays off after headlight swap
matrix light function lost after replacement
coding fault B-code after headlight work
physical_solution: For OEMs requiring coding: use OEM tool to code new component variant into FEM/BCM. Simpler OEMs: plug-and-play with no coding required. Perform headlight aiming after any headlight work.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — Most Toyota/Honda/Nissan/GM/Stellantis headlight replacements: no coding required, plug-and-play. BMW FEM coding: ISTA required on F/G-series. VW/Audi FEM coding: ODIS required on 2016+ with adaptive/matrix. Ford headlamp leveling calibration: IDS on newer, ELM327 $31 on older. Hyundai/Kia DRL: ELM327 accessible pre-2019.
preconditions: New headlight assembly physically installed and connected
All connectors fully seated (adaptive headlight connectors are multi-pin)
No physical damage to wiring harness

procedure_steps.description: DETERMINE IF CODING NEEDED: Standard halogen/LED non-adaptive headlights on any OEM: NO coding required. Adaptive/steerable headlights on BMW/VW/Audi 2016+: coding REQUIRED. Matrix LED on BMW/VW/Audi 2018+: coding REQUIRED. AFS (Adaptive Front lighting System) on Honda/Toyota: Techstream/HDS coding may be needed.
Read lighting-related DTCs: $19 02 FF to FEM/BCM (BMW FEM 0x00, VW FEM 0x55). Any B-code related to headlight variant mismatch indicates coding required.

BMW PROCEDURE: ISTA → Vehicle → Headlight → Component coding. Select correct headlight variant (halogen/bi-xenon/full LED/LaserLight). Code variant to FEM. Then: Service Functions → Headlight Vertical Aim Calibration. Applies to F-series and G-series.

VW/AUDI PROCEDURE: ODIS → Component coding → Front electronics (J519/J623). Select headlight type from coding menu. Pre-2019: VCDS coding channel also works. After coding: Basic Settings → Headlight range control calibration.
Ford headlamp leveling calibration: $31 01 [HEADLAMP_LEVEL_ROUTINE] to BCM after F-150/Edge/Explorer headlight replacement. Aligns automatic leveling to neutral position. ELM327 accessible pre-2018.

HEADLIGHT AIMING (ALL VEHICLES): After any headlight replacement, aim headlights regardless of coding. Use aiming screen or alignment targets at 25ft. Adjust vertical aim screw. Left headlight: aim cutoff 2 inches below horizontal. Right headlight: slight upward kick on right side of cutoff.

Verify: no B-codes related to lighting. Adaptive function (swiveling) operates during test drive turns. DRL activates at engine start. Headlight leveling adjusts under load. Auto high-beam function (if equipped) operates correctly.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Most Toyota/Lexus: plug-and-play. AFS (Adaptive Front-lighting System) on Lexus LS/RX: HDS/Techstream calibration after replacement. HID auto-leveling sensor calibration after headlight or leveling sensor work. ELM327 $31 accessible.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: Most Honda: plug-and-play. Acura MDX/RDX with AFS: HDS calibration required. LED headlights on 2019+ Accord: plug-and-play. No coding for standard replacement.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: Most Nissan: plug-and-play. Infiniti adaptive LED (QX80/Q60): CONSULT III+ calibration. Pre-2015: no coding needed.
oem_notes.Ford: Most Ford: plug-and-play. Adaptive headlights on MKZ/Continental: IDS coding. F-150 with auto-leveling: IDS leveling calibration on 2018+. ELM327 $31 works on older for leveling calibration.
oem_notes.GM: Most GM: plug-and-play. Cadillac with IntelliBeam (auto high-beam): calibration via GDS2. Chevy/GMC standard replacement: no coding.
oem_notes.BMW: MOST COMPLEX: Every headlight replacement on F/G-series requires ISTA coding. FEM stores headlight variant. Wrong coding = permanent faults, no adaptive function. Matrix/LaserLight on G7/i8: ISTA absolutely required. F-series bi-xenon: ISTA coding + leveling calibration.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Second most complex: ODIS required for any adaptive/IQ.Light system 2018+. Pre-2016 halogen: no coding. 2016-2018 LED with AFS: VCDS coding works. 2019+: ODIS + SFD. Audi Matrix LED: ODIS mandatory.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Most Stellantis: plug-and-play. Ram 1500 with adaptive headlights: wiTECH calibration. Jeep Grand Cherokee with LED: plug-and-play on pre-2022.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Most Hyundai/Kia: plug-and-play. Genesis G80/G90 with adaptive LED: GDS2 calibration. DRL coding: ELM327 $2E accessible pre-2019 for DRL enable/disable.
